Case Studies

Real projects. Measurable outcomes.

We let the results speak. Below is a selection of enterprise engagements — each showing the challenge, what we built, and what changed as a result.

Financial Services

InvestCorp Group

Software Engineering

Rebuilt a 15-year-old core operations platform — delivered in 6 months.

InvestCorp's legacy platform was a bottleneck across every department. We re-architected the entire system using a modern microservices approach, delivered in parallel with zero business disruption.

74%faster processing
99.9%uptime post-launch
3×team capacity unlocked
Platform EngineeringAPI DesignCloud Migration

Retail & E-Commerce

PulseCommerce

Growth & Intelligence

Built a full analytics stack — 3.2× revenue growth in 18 months.

PulseCommerce had data scattered across 11 tools. We built a unified data warehouse, BI dashboards, and a performance marketing intelligence layer that transformed how leadership made decisions.

3.2×revenue growth
280%organic traffic increase
18 moto results
Data ArchitectureBI DashboardsSEO Strategy

Healthcare

Meridian Health Network

Business Foundation

Automated 80% of manual workflows — saving 1,200 staff hours per month.

Meridian's operations team was drowning in manual data entry, reporting, and cross-system reconciliation. We mapped, redesigned, and automated their core administrative workflows end-to-end.

1,200hrs/mo saved
80%workflows automated
40%error rate reduction
Process AutomationSystems IntegrationOperational Dashboards

Logistics & Supply Chain

Ashford Logistics

Software Engineering

Built a real-time shipment tracking platform — 10,000+ daily active users.

Ashford needed a customer-facing tracking platform that could handle real-time data from 40+ carrier integrations. We delivered a scalable, sub-100ms response system with a clean consumer UX.

10k+daily active users
<100msAPI response time
40+carrier integrations
Platform DevelopmentReal-time APIsEnterprise UX

Real Estate & PropTech

Summit Property Group

Business Foundation

Created a centralized deal management system that replaced 4 separate tools.

Summit was managing deals across spreadsheets, email threads, shared drives, and two legacy CRMs. We replaced the entire stack with a unified deal management platform built around how their team actually works.

4→1tools consolidated
65%faster deal closing
100%team adoption in 30 days
Systems IntegrationCustom CRMWorkflow Design

Manufacturing

Crestview Manufacturing

Growth & Intelligence

Designed a production intelligence dashboard — first profitable quarter in 3 years.

Crestview had no visibility into production efficiency, waste, or throughput variation. We built a real-time production intelligence layer connected to their floor systems, revealing $1.2M in previously invisible inefficiencies.

$1.2Minefficiencies identified
Q1first profitable quarter
22%waste reduction
Manufacturing AnalyticsIoT IntegrationBI Dashboards

Want results like these?

Let's talk about your business. We'll give you an honest perspective on what's possible and how to get there.
